description.p: Ferrite is a fast, native markdown editor with live preview, syntax highlighting, and native Mermaid diagram rendering. Built with Rust and egui for excellent performance.

ul.li: Three view modes: Raw editing, Split view, and full WYSIWYG preview
Native Mermaid diagram rendering (flowcharts, sequence, class, state, ER, Gantt, pie charts, and more)
CSV/TSV viewer with rainbow column coloring and sorting
JSON/YAML/TOML tree viewer with collapsible nodes
Git integration with visual status indicators in file tree
Workspace mode with file tree navigation
Find and replace with regex support
Synchronized scrolling between editor and preview
Customizable syntax highlighting themes (25+ themes)
Dark and light application themes
Zen mode for distraction-free writing
Multi-language interface support
Multi-encoding file support with auto-detection

screenshot.caption: Ferrite in dark mode with split view showing markdown editing and live preview
Raw editing mode with syntax highlighting

description.p: First code-signed release with integrated terminal, productivity hub, and bug fixes

ul.li: Integrated terminal workspace with tiling, splitting, and layout persistence
Productivity hub panel for quick-access editing tasks
Windows code signing via SignPath Foundation (no more SmartScreen warnings)
App.rs refactored into ~15 focused modules
Tab drag reorder and file watcher auto-reload
CJK font lazy loading reduces startup memory by ~80MB
Fixed CJK font crash on startup and portable Windows startup crash
Fixed duplicate line, smart paste, drag-drop positioning, and 5+ other bugs
CJK first-line paragraph indentation for Chinese and Japanese

description.p: Major release: Custom text editor (FerriteEditor) replacing egui's TextEdit

ul.li: Virtual scrolling enables 100MB+ file editing
Memory optimization: 80MB file uses ~80MB RAM (was 460MB+)
Rope-based buffer for O(log n) text operations
Full selection, clipboard, undo/redo support
IME support for Chinese, Japanese, Korean input
Code folding and multi-cursor editing
Navigation buttons (Top/Middle/Bottom)
Box drawing character support

description.p: UI improvements, extended syntax support, Linux performance fixes, and Flathub submission

ul.li: View mode segmented control (Raw/Split/Rendered)
100+ additional language syntaxes
25+ syntax highlighting themes
Fixed Linux folder opening freeze
Fixed blockquote/table overflow
Flathub desktop and metainfo files

description.p: Editor shortcuts, macOS improvements, Linux fixes, i18n cleanup

ul.li: Delete Line shortcut (Cmd/Ctrl+D)
Move Line Up/Down (Alt+Up/Down)
macOS file type associations
Windows portable build and MSI installer
Linux RPM package
Fixed Ctrl+X cutting entire document bug
Fixed Linux window drag stuck mouse
Added Estonian and Norwegian Bokmål translations
Tiered idle repaint system reducing CPU usage
Multi-encoding file support with auto-detection
CJK font lazy loading for reduced memory usage
Improved cursor positioning in rendered view
Fixed 10% idle CPU usage

description.p: Major feature release with Mermaid diagrams and workspace improvements
